title: Forza Horizon 6 – Sakura Drift Concept: Tokyo Cherry Blossom Supra Scene
fullPrompt: An ultra-realistic, low-angle (bottom-to-top) Forza Horizon 6 concept photograph, styled as a dramatic Instagram ad (4:5 aspect ratio). The shot captures a character leaning casually against the driver's door of a custom, highly detailed white Toyota Supra (A90) parked on a wet, asphalt road in a densely wooded suburban Tokyo street. The pavement is thickly covered in fallen pink cherry blossom (sakura) petals.The character (a young woman with sharp, photo-realistic and illustrated features, wearing a stylized 'Horizon Festival Japan' techwear jacket) is smiling slightly, with a detailed watch and rings visible. The Toyota Supra is low to the ground with massive aftermarket wheels, detailed brake calipers, and a aggressive carbon fiber spoiler. Above, a massive canopy of fully bloomed sakura trees creates a beautiful tunnel of pink and green, with rays of sunlight filtering through. The background features blurred traditional Japanese street signs (kanji and hiragana) and power lines, with towering modern Tokyo skyscrapers visible faintly through the distant haze. The bottom frame emphasizes the wet texture of the road, fallen petals, and the Supra's front bumper. The lighting is soft and golden (golden hour), emphasizing the vibrant nature against the wet concrete and carbon fiber.
author: Admin
